reason: Issue-to-PR workflow, dependency invariants, Trellis gates, and dogfood routing for this repo.
Live #647, dependency checks, SPEC/upstream scan, and file-size signal implementation verdict.
Subagent review found package test caching could miss newly tracked oversized files; CI now runs the file-size gate with -count=1 before the general race test gate.
Local and Docker follow-through gates mirror CI by running the uncached file-size gate before the general Go gate.
Codex reviewer found the authoritative local checklist also needs the uncached file-size gate so agents cannot claim CI parity with only the cached aggregate test.
The dogfood GitHub workflow template mirrors the new local checklist with the uncached file-size gate before the race gate.
